title: rubus oliganthus
intro: Rubus oliganthus, also known as the few-flowered raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its small white flowers and edible red berries. The medicinal properties of Rubus oliganthus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus oliganthus berries include their potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Rubus oliganthus typically involve drying or freezing the berries to preserve their medicinal properties and use them in teas, jams, or as a supplement.
